_comment: TreatmentExplainer VO — references the SSL 2026 house voice preset. Scripts drafted via 3-layer protocol (see treatments/treatment-explainer-vo.md).

scenes.text: Brief any video — in three layers.
Every video follows three layers — the brief, the skeleton, and the treatment.
Layer one is the brief — what you want, who watches, and the feel you're going for.
Layer two — pick your shape. Story, sales, social, or audio-led — each has its own skeleton.
Layer three — the treatment. Scene by scene — visual, motion, text, audio, all spelled out.
That's the whole pipeline — from idea to shipped video.
